positive: You're the best thing about this place.
You've given me more than you realize.
I'd trust you with my last coin.
I know you'll do the right thing.
That felt good to say. Thank you.
You've changed things here. For the better.
I hope I can repay what you've done.
Don't forget. You've got a friend here.
I'm proud to know you. I mean that.
You've given me something rare. Hope.
You act where others only talk. That matters.
I feel lighter having told you that.
You're braver than you know. I mean that.
You've earned a loyalty deeper than words.
You give me reason to believe things improve.
You've seen my worst and stayed. That's gold.
You're the kind songs should be about.
I'll sleep easier knowing you have this.
You've restored something I thought I'd lost.
I've never been more certain of anyone.
I've put my faith in you. Gladly.
You and I have something rare. Real trust.
I know who matters. You matter.
I'd follow you into the unknown. That's fact.
You make me honest. That says everything.
I've seen real loyalty. It looks like you.
You're one of the few truly good people.
I'm grateful. For you. For this. For honesty.
You've honored me with trust. I hope I honored you.
The world hasn't seen what you're capable of.
I wouldn't change a thing about knowing you.
You've given me a reason to keep going.
I'll remember this for the rest of my days.
You're proof that trust is still possible.
Trusting you was the best decision I made.
I've never spoken this freely before. You do that.
You give me courage just by being around.
Every word was true. I'd say them again.
You've left a good mark on this place.
The world should know you the way I do.
I survived this far knowing people like you exist.
Thank you for letting me be honest.
You've become family. That's the highest thing I can say.
I'd bet everything on you. And I just did.
I've never had a friend like you.
You came as a stranger. Now I trust you most.
The road is long. Knowing you makes it shorter.
You've made me braver. I hope I did the same.
I couldn't have said this to anyone else.
negative: If the world turns against you, I'm here.
I'll carry this burden with you.
You're not alone. Not while I'm breathing.
If anything happens, remember what I told you.
You carry more weight than most people see.
When things get dark, remember I believe in you.
I said it because I care. Don't doubt that.
If this is goodbye, know that you mattered.
You carry weight others can't even see.
You're not facing what comes next alone.
We'll get through this. Together.
If the worst happens, I'll find you.
I'll see you through this. No matter what.
I hope you heard what I couldn't quite say.
There's a debt I'll spend my life repaying.
neutral: You know I've always got your back.
Anything you need, just say the word.
I'd walk through fire for you.
Whatever you decide, I'm with you.
I wouldn't have said that to anyone else.
Take care of yourself. I truly mean that.
The fact that you listened means everything.
We've been through too much to hold back.
Stay safe. The world needs people like you.
No one else I'd rather have beside me.
I wanted you to have the truth.
I'm not good at this. But thank you.
May the road treat you kindly. Come back.
I'd go to war for you. I mean it.
I want you in whatever the future holds.
Use what I've told you well.
I'll be here. Always. You know that.
This stays between us. That's our bond.
I wouldn't trade our friendship for anything.
You've got someone in your corner. Always.
That you came to me first means everything.
Guard that knowledge. It came from someone who cares.
I'll hold the line. You do what matters.
I've given you all I have. It's yours.
You're the one good thing I'm certain of.
I'll pray for you. And I mean it.
No goodbye between us. Just 'until next time.'
I'd sooner doubt the sun than doubt you.
Take heart. Take care. Take it to heart.
I needed to say that. You needed to hear it.
I'll watch your back from here. Always have.
That was harder to say. But you deserved it.
If I can't tell you again. You made a difference.
Wherever the road takes you, part of me follows.
Stay true. That's all I'd ever ask.
Count on me the way I count on you.
That's everything I know and feel. Both yours.
Go well. And come back. Not a request.
You leave knowing you have a real ally.
Keep your head up. I'll be watching for you.
I told the truth. That's what we owe each other.
You have my word, my trust, my silence.
I'll think of you. Not in worry. Gratitude.
You deserve better. But I'm glad you're here.
There's nothing I wouldn't share with you.
I'll keep watch here. Do what you do best.
That's the honest truth. Nothing less.
Remember this moment. I needed you to hear it.
Be safe. If not safe, be smart.
If you need rest, my door is open.
I'll keep watch. You do the same.
Look after yourself first. That's an order.
The world needs people like you. Stay in it.
I trust you with everything. Said and unsaid.
Go knowing you carry my faith with you.
Our bond is stronger than distance. Remember that.
You carry a piece of my trust now.
My truth, laid bare. Your heart knows what to do.
I'll hold the fort. You hold the line.
This conversation stays with me. Like all ours do.
Safe travels, dear friend. My thoughts go with you.
I'll be counting the days until you're back.
Don't be a stranger. It's not the same without you.

positive: That's what friends are for.
Glad I could help. You'd do the same for me.
I'm glad we had this talk.
Drop by again soon. I appreciate the company.
I'm sure you'll figure out the right move.
You've got good instincts. Trust them.
I'm rooting for you.
I'm glad I know someone like you.
You bring out the best in people around here. Including me.
I'd bet on you over most of the people I know.
I'm glad you came by. Truly.
You'll handle it. I believe that.
Rest easy tonight. Tomorrow's a new day.
Keep your chin up. Things have a way of working out.
You're good people. Don't let anyone tell you otherwise.
Take that with my best wishes.
Good luck out there. I mean that sincerely.
Go well, friend. And come back with stories.
Next time you're in the area, stop by. First drink is on me.
You make this place feel a little less lonely. Come back soon.
May the wind be at your back. And the trouble behind it.
Pass along the kindness when you can. That's all anyone can ask.
You've always been fair with me. I hope I've been the same.
Take it in stride. You always do.
negative: Just watch yourself out there.
I hope it all turns out to be nothing.
I'd hate to see anything happen to you.
Promise me you'll be careful.
Watch your back out there.
I'll sleep better knowing you're aware.
Come back in one piece.
If things go sideways, you can count on me.
I told you because I care. Keep that in mind.
Stay warm out there. And stay careful.
I didn't tell you this to scare you. Just to prepare you.
I hope the next time we talk, it's over something lighter.
Don't worry too much about it. But don't forget about it either.
I'd rather over-warn you than under-warn you.
I've got a feeling you'll be fine. But just in case. Be careful.
Stay cautious, but don't let it steal your sleep.
I hope I haven't given you too much to worry about.
If you're heading out, take the long way. It's safer.
I'm not worried about you. Not really. Just... be smart.
I hope this helps more than it worries.
If things get rough, remember you're not dealing with them alone.
I wouldn't worry too much. But I wouldn't ignore it either.
Look, just be careful, all right? People like you are hard to find.
I hope that wasn't too much. You asked, after all.
Look out for yourself, all right?
neutral: Stay safe, will you?
Figured you should hear it from a friend.
Take care of yourself.
You didn't hear that from me, though.
Let me know if you hear anything else.
Look after yourself.
Come find me if you need anything.
I'll keep an ear out for you.
Be careful who you share that with.
Don't be a stranger.
You know where to find me if you need help.
Keep your wits about you.
I'll keep my eyes open and let you know if anything changes.
Take that for whatever it's worth. I think it's worth a lot.

If it turns out to be something, you know where I am.
Use it wisely. I know you will.
Stay sharp. The world rewards the alert.
If you need a second opinion, you know the door.
Take it easy, friend.
I'll be here if you need to talk again.
I passed that along in good faith. Do the same.
Hope the road ahead is kinder than the road behind.
If this leads somewhere, bring me along. I'd like to help.
I wouldn't have told you if I didn't think you could handle it.
Let's hope it sorts itself out. But if it doesn't, we'll manage.
I've done my part. Now it's in your hands.
Always glad to share what I know with someone who listens.
Safe travels. And don't hesitate to swing by.
I think you'll handle this better than most.
Keep me posted if you learn anything new.
We'll catch up again soon, I'm sure.
I feel better having told you. Less weight on the shoulders.
Hope that proves useful. Or at least interesting.
If it means anything, I'm on your side.
I reckon you'll do right by what I've told you.
Just be smart about it. That's all I ask.
If you hear the full story, fill me in.
I trust you to know what to do next.
You've got a good head on your shoulders. Use it.
Come back anytime. The door's always open for you.
That's my piece. I hope it serves you well.
I'll be thinking of you on the road.
If anything comes of it, I'd love to hear about it.
There's more where that came from, if you're ever curious.
I'll hold onto anything else I hear. For you.
You know how to find me. Don't be shy about it.
I'd tell you to be careful, but I know you already are.
I've done what I can. The rest is yours.
If I hear more, you'll be the first to know.
Stay level-headed about this. I know you will.
That's my honest take. Take it with a warm heart.
Thanks for listening. Not everyone does.
Whatever happens, you've got at least one person pulling for you.
This stays between friends, yeah?
Remember who your friends are. That includes me.
I've shared what I know. Now let's both keep our ears open.
I'd rather you know too much than too little.
When this blows over, we should share a proper meal.
That's the lay of it. I trust your read on things.
If things change, I'll send word. Count on that.
I'm pulling for you. Don't forget that.
Use that however you see fit. I know you'll be wise about it.
I'll miss the company. Come back when you can.
That's all I've got. But I've got more faith in you than in any of it.
If nothing else, at least we've had an honest conversation.
I'll keep the lights on for you. In case you need to come back.
That's my two coins. Worth more to you than to me, I think.
I'll be waiting to hear how it turns out.
You've got friends in this settlement. Don't forget that.
I trust you'll know when to act and when to wait.
Until next time, friend. Stay sharp.
That's all for now. But my door's always open.
I'll hold a good thought for you.
Go carefully. And go well.
Stay true to yourself out there. The road has a way of testing that.

positive: Hopefully it's useful. If not, at least I tried.
I've spoken plainly. That's all I know how to do.
I've told you everything worth telling.
That's the best account I can give.
I've done my due diligence. Rest is up to you.

Good enough? Good enough.

I've laid it out. The shape of it is yours to decide.
Consider yourself informed. What comes next is your affair.
negative: Whether this helps or not, it's off my conscience now.
I'll forget about this by tomorrow, probably. You might not.
I'm not going to pretend this is urgent. But it's real.
It's just noise, maybe. But consistent noise.
I wouldn't lose sleep over it.

I'm not going to lose sleep over it. You can if you want.

If you find out more, don't feel obligated to share.

Could go either way, far as I can tell.

Not much else to say on the matter.
I'm not going to tell you what to think about it.
Whether it's worth acting on is your business.
I'll be going about my day now.
Anyway. That's been on my mind.
You'll hear different versions from different people.
That's all I've got. Which is about all anyone's got.
Not trying to tell you what to do. Just what I know.
Can't do much more than pass it along.
I've run out of things to say about it.
I've no opinion on what happens next.
Take it for the idle observation it is.
It is what it is.

You'll have to follow up on the rest yourself.
I've got nothing invested in this. Just thought you should know.
If I hear more, maybe I'll mention it. Maybe not.
I don't have a recommendation. Just a report.
Seemed worth mentioning. Whether it's worth remembering is another thing.

That's what I've gathered. Not more, not less.
Fair enough if you don't care. I said it anyway.
That's the extent of my knowledge. And my interest.
That's about all I'm willing to volunteer.
I told you what I heard. The sorting is yours.
Take it, leave it, or file it away. Doesn't matter to me.
That's where I stand. Not firmly, but there.
You'll form your own opinion regardless of what I say.
I've told you as much as anyone else knows.
It'll resolve itself or it won't.
Don't quote me on any of that.

Take it on my word, or don't. I'll understand either way.

I'll leave you to it.

You heard it. I said it. That's the arrangement.
Not sure what else to add.
That's the version I was told. Take the margin of error into account.
Anyway. Back to work.
If you need more, you'll have to ask someone who knows more.
That's the public version, anyway.

negative: Don't make me regret opening my mouth.
I hope you appreciate how little I wanted to share that.
I'm adding this to the list of things I regret.
If I seem relieved, it's because this conversation is ending.
I'm going to need a long walk after this.
I told you because I had to. Not because I wanted to.
That was necessary. That doesn't mean it was welcome.
I shared that under duress of conscience. Nothing more.
I didn't do this for you. I did it despite you.
I've been helpful. It cost me. Don't make me pay twice.
We spoke. It's over. Let's both recover.
I hope the next person I talk to is less exhausting.
I hope that's the last time I have to lower myself to this.
I'd say it's been a pleasure, but we both know better.
I've said enough. Probably too much.
I'd prefer if we didn't acknowledge this happened.
You owe me for this, though you'll never pay.
If this backfires, it's your problem.
That's the last bit of goodwill you'll get from me.
Don't look so pleased. I'm already regretting it.
I'm going to pretend we didn't have this conversation.
I'm going to walk away now. Don't follow.
You're on your own from here. As always.
Let's pretend the last few minutes didn't happen.
Go. Now. Before I remember why I don't like talking to you.
I'm closing this door behind you. Figuratively and literally.
You got the information. I got the headache. Fair trade.
Now, if you'll excuse me, I'm going to enjoy your absence.
I'll pretend I never said a word. You should do the same.
That exhausts my supply of kindness for the month.
My goodwill has been fully depleted for the day.
I've given what I'm giving. The well is dry.
That's the most I've said to someone I dislike in years.
neutral: That's all I'm willing to say.
Don't expect this kind of favor again.
You've had your fill. Now move along.
We're not going to make a habit of this.
That's the end of it. Don't come back looking for more.
You got more than you deserved. Be grateful.
Don't interpret this as warmth. It isn't.
I won't be this generous twice.
Now go. I've got things to do that don't involve you.
That's your lot. Don't push it.
That's all you're worth to me right now.
Don't look at me like I did you a favor.
The less we talk, the better we get along.

If you tell anyone I told you this, I'll deny it.
I've reached my limit for conversation today.
You've taken up enough of my time.
I said what I said. Don't make me repeat it.
This doesn't change anything between us.
If that doesn't satisfy you, find someone who cares.
I've been patient. That patience is now spent.
I won't be saying that again, so I hope you listened.
Now leave me to my work.
Don't read too much into this.
I helped you once. Don't expect a pattern.
Don't mistake my talking for interest in your well-being.
If you act on that, keep my name out of it.
I've done my duty. That's all this was.
Take the information and take your leave.
I'm done. You should be too.
I'd say 'you're welcome,' but I didn't do this for thanks.
Let's not do this again.
I've spoken. Now it's time for silence.
Don't come knocking again.
That's as much civility as I can muster.
Don't make this a thing. It's not a thing.
I've said my piece. Now find someone else to bother.
I tolerated you. That's the nicest thing I'll do today.
Count yourself lucky and move on.
If I never have to tell you anything again, I'll be content.
That's the ceiling of my helpfulness. You've hit it.
This conversation is over. Take the hint.
I shared what I shared. Don't ask why.
Don't expect me to hold your hand through the rest.
If that's not enough, tough.
I've spent more time on you than I planned. Good day.
Now we go back to not talking. Agreed?
Take it and go before I change my mind about being helpful.
I've thrown you a bone. Don't expect a meal.
That's my final word on it.
I've been more patient than you deserve. Let's leave it there.
You got what you came for. Now go.
Don't confuse this with friendship. It's barely civility.
I'll deny everything if you bring this up publicly.
That's the last nice thing I'll do this week. Enjoy it.
I've used up my allotment of helpfulness. Don't ask for more.
Consider that a parting gift. From someone who doesn't like you.
Good. We're done. Finally.
Don't interpret my silence after this as an invitation.
That's the best you'll get. And more than I intended.
Keep walking and keep quiet.
This buys you nothing with me. Understand that.
My willingness to talk has just expired.
Don't come back expecting the same treatment.
That's the thinnest thread of cooperation I'll offer.
I've done enough. More than enough, really.
Don't turn this into a regular occurrence.
Go away satisfied, or go away unsatisfied. Either way, go away.
I'll go back to ignoring you now.
Good. Conversation over. Finally.
Take your leave. I've taken more than enough of mine.
That came from duty, not affection. Keep that straight.
Don't quote me. Don't mention me. Don't return.
I'm not going to ask if you understood. I don't care enough.
That's the extent of my involvement. Starting now.
I'd rather we go back to mutual avoidance after this.
If you remember one thing, remember that I didn't owe you this.
Now then. Are we through? Good.
That's the best view you'll get from my good side.
I've contributed enough. Go manage the rest yourself.
Don't look at me like we bonded. We didn't.
That's as far as my professionalism extends.
Consider this the exception that proves the rule.
Don't try to shake my hand. Just leave.
That's the absolute limit. Don't test it.
Don't wave at me in public after this.
Go think about what I said. Far from here, preferably.
Let's return to a comfortable distance.
Don't mistake endurance for warmth.
Don't bring me into whatever you do with this.
This changes nothing between us. Remember that.
We're done here. Thoroughly.

negative: Don't come crying to me when it goes wrong.
Good luck, you'll need it.
If you fail, don't drag the rest of us down with you.
That's the only warning you'll get.
I hope I never have to speak to you again.
You're dead to me after this conversation.
If you mention my name in connection to any of this, I'll make you regret it.
That information is wasted on someone like you.
The only thing you've earned from me is my contempt.
The world would be better off if you stayed out of the way.
I'd say I hope you fail, but I said what I said because I need you not to.
My stomach turns just from this conversation.
I regret every syllable. But it needed saying.
I hate that I've been useful to you.
Everything in me wanted to stay silent. Everything.
I'd sooner befriend a plague rat.
Don't thank me. I might actually be sick.
If you waste what I just told you, I'll never forgive you. Or myself.
I told you because I had to. Every other instinct screamed no.
My contempt for you hasn't changed. Only my silence has.
I've expended more goodwill in five minutes than you deserve in a lifetime.
I'll remember this as the day I compromised my principles. For you.
I feel dirty for helping you. But someone had to.
The world is cruel to make me rely on someone like you.
I've stained my dignity for the sake of doing the right thing. Be worthy of it.
If you ever develop a conscience, maybe you'll understand what this cost me.
I just did the hardest thing I've done all week. It was talking to you.
You are, without question, the worst part of my week.
I'd rather pull my own teeth than have another talk like this.
I'm appalled at myself for speaking to you.
neutral: Not that you'd do anything about it.
Don't say I didn't tell you.
Now leave me be.
That's all you're getting from me.
I've got nothing else to say.
We're done here.
Do whatever you want with that.
Now stop bothering me.

Next time, figure it out yourself.
I've got better things to do.

Now disappear before I say something I'll actually regret.
You're welcome. I nearly choked on the words, but there they are.
I need a drink after talking to you.
Every moment you stand there is a moment I suffer.
Get out. I mean it.
I've helped you for the last time.
Go ruin something that isn't my afternoon.
If this was a transaction, I got robbed.
Don't come back. I'll say it plainer if I have to.

Now walk away before I change my mind about staying civil.
I'd wish you luck, but I don't wish you anything.

Carry that knowledge far away from me.

Don't mistake my cooperation for anything other than necessity.
Go. And don't look back at me as you do.
If you thought this was hard for you, imagine how it felt for me.
The best thing you can do for me is forget my face.
Take this and whatever shred of dignity you still carry, and leave.
I'm going to scrub this conversation from my memory.

I hope you appreciate that I'd rather have said nothing.
Now go make someone else's life miserable.

Get lost. And I mean that geographically.

I've opened my mouth once. It stays shut from here.

I'd say 'until we meet again,' but I pray we never do.
This is what you came for. This is all you'll ever get.
Don't be seen around here. Not by me. Not by anyone who knows me.
If this blows up, I'll deny we ever spoke.
The worst part of my day is almost over. You're walking away.

You owe me a debt you'll never be able to repay. My time.
If you think this changes anything, you're even more foolish than you look.
Get gone. The sooner I forget you were here, the better.
May the road take you very far from here. And keep you there.
I've said too much. That's your fault, not mine.
Don't think this bought you anything. It didn't.
Leave before I say what I'm actually thinking.
If you're expecting a handshake, you'll be standing there a long time.
I've given you the barest scrap. Be glad it was that much.
This conversation has been a low point. Go away.
I want you out of my sight before I count to three.
That's your lot. Every bitter morsel of it.
I held my tongue on ten different things just now. Be grateful.
I hope this is the last time we suffer each other's company.
Go. And take your problems with you.
You'll get nothing more from me. Not today. Not ever.
Consider this the end of our acquaintance.
If I had any less self-control, this would have gone very differently.
Go quickly. My patience died several sentences ago.
I'll survive this conversation, but only barely.
That's the last time I'll share anything with you. Mark it.
Don't write me. Don't visit. Don't think of me fondly. Just go.
The information is yours. My goodwill is not. And never will be.
I'm closing this chapter. Don't try to reopen it.
Go. Before the guards hear the things I want to say to you.
That's it. The absolute end. Now vanish.
I'm going to sit here and enjoy the silence after you leave.
If you have any decency at all, you'll stay away.
I'll scrub every trace of this from my day. Starting now.
The kindest thing you can do for me is disappear.
May we never, ever do this again.
